items.name: Brown Emo Chained Tie + White Cross Collar
items.description:
More versions - https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=tie+collar&Category=1&CreatorName=Manwire+UGC&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

More Manwire UGC here - https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Manwire%20UGC&salesTypeFilter=1

Brown Emo Chained Tie + White Cross Collar delivers sharp alt-core style with a bold contrast. Featuring a sleek brown tie accented with hanging chains and paired with a crisp white collar marked by a striking cross detail, this accessory blends emo, goth, and punk fashion into one fierce statement piece.
